pinnedMessages.welcome-and-verify: **Welcome** — Use **/verify** to get a code by email (OTP). After verification you will be in **Holding** until a CEO or Server Manager approves you.
pinnedMessages.rules: **Server rules** — Read the rules above. Use **/verify** with your @granjur.com email, then wait for approval.
pinnedMessages.documentation: **Documentation** — Use the dropdown below to **search and browse** project docs, repo READMEs, or meeting notes. Select a **repo** to view its README; select a **project** to view its stored README. You can **edit** docs with **/edit-docs**.
pinnedMessages.general-meetings: **Meetings** — General meeting channel. Schedule meetings with **/schedule**. Upcoming meetings and reminders appear in the **upcoming-meetings** channel.
pinnedMessages.upcoming-meetings: **Upcoming meetings** — Reminders are posted here **10 minutes** before each scheduled meeting, tagging the invited members.
pinnedMessages.casual-chat: **Casual chat** — General conversation. Keep it friendly.
pinnedMessages.pet-pics: **Pet pictures** — Share pictures of your pets.
pinnedMessages.meeting-metadata: **Meeting metadata** — Meeting notes and metadata are archived here.
pinnedMessages.sql-dumps: **SQL dumps** — Versioned SQL dumps per project. Use **/sql-dump** to view, search, or submit changes. All changes are tracked (who, what, when).
pinnedMessages.admin: **Admin** — Backlog notifications. When someone enters holding, server owner and CEOs are tagged here. Use **/backlog** to approve.
